title: Instrument kenyan ET Accusé de réception de l'instrument français du 9 novembre

pages.text:
Telegraphic Address: "Foe.ox'

HARAMBEE HOUSE

HARAMBES AVINUE

"Telephone: 27411

When replying picase quorc

Ref. No. MF.A.

and 127/094/45

ARRIVE

Dato b. 11. 71

MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS

POP 30551

NAIROBI

KENYA

19.

cloner

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Kenya presents its compliments to the French Embassy and with reference to the latter's Note N.141/II.12 dated 9th November 1971 concerning the coming into force of the Agreement on Cultural and Technical

Co-operation between the Government of the Republic of Kenya and the Government of the French Republic, signed in Nairobi on 14th Septerber, 1971 has the honour to inform the Embassy that the relevant constitutional requirements of Kenya have been complied with. Accordingly the Agreement may now be construed to come into effect from the date of the present Note pursuant to Article XVI thereof.

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic

of Kenya avails itself of this opportunity to renew to the French Embassy the assurances of its highest consideration.

French Embassy,

NAIROBI.

MINISTRY

22nd November, 1971

NATROBI

AFFAIRS:

FORTE
